Package net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block

Interface BlockChunk

All Known Subinterfaces:
MutableBlockChunk
All Known Implementing Classes:
BlockChunkImpl, MutableBlockChunkImpl
@NullMarked public interface BlockChunk
Represents a chunk of blocks in a schematic, providing access to block data, chunk position, and chunk properties. Implementations may be mutable or immutable.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static MutableBlockChunk
    empty()
    Creates an empty mutable block chunk with default parameters.
    net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.Position
    getActualPos()
    Returns the actual position of this chunk in the schematic space.
    net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.axis.AxisOrder
    getAxisOrder()
    Returns the axis order used for this chunk (e.g., XYZ, XZY).
    @Nullable BlockData
    getBlock(net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.Position pos)
    Gets the block data at the specified position.
    net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.Position
    getChunkPos()
    Returns the chunk position (grid-aligned position) of this chunk.
    long
    getMask()
    Returns the mask value for this chunk, which may represent block presence or metadata.
    List<Pointer>
    getPointers()
    Returns the pointers for this chunk.
    double
    getScaler()
    Returns the scaler value for this chunk, which may be used for scaling block coordinates.
    net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.AreaSize
    getSizeOfEntireChunk()
    Returns the size of the entire chunk.
    BlockChunk
    immutable()
    Returns an immutable version of this chunk.
    MutableBlockChunk
    mutable()
    Returns a mutable version of this chunk.

  • Method Details

    • empty

      static MutableBlockChunk empty()
      Creates an empty mutable block chunk with default parameters.
      Returns:
      a new empty MutableBlockChunk

    • getPointers

      List<Pointer> getPointers()
      Returns the pointers for this chunk. The pointers represent block locations or references.
      Returns:
      a list of Pointer objects

    • getBlock

      @Nullable BlockData getBlock(net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.Position pos)
      Gets the block data at the specified position.
      Parameters:
      pos - the position to query
      Returns:
      the BlockData at the position, or null if none exists

    • getMask

      long getMask()
      Returns the mask value for this chunk, which may represent block presence or metadata.
      Returns:
      the mask as a long value

    • getScaler

      double getScaler()
      Returns the scaler value for this chunk, which may be used for scaling block coordinates.
      Returns:
      the scaler as a double value

    • getActualPos

      net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.Position getActualPos()
      Returns the actual position of this chunk in the schematic space.
      Returns:
      the actual Position

    • getChunkPos

      net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.Position getChunkPos()
      Returns the chunk position (grid-aligned position) of this chunk.
      Returns:
      the chunk Position

    • getAxisOrder

      net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.axis.AxisOrder getAxisOrder()
      Returns the axis order used for this chunk (e.g., XYZ, XZY).
      Returns:
      the AxisOrder

    • getSizeOfEntireChunk

      net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.AreaSize getSizeOfEntireChunk()
      Returns the size of the entire chunk.
      Returns:
      the AreaSize representing the chunk size

    • mutable

      MutableBlockChunk mutable()
      Returns a mutable version of this chunk.
      Returns:
      a MutableBlockChunk

    • immutable

      BlockChunk immutable()
      Returns an immutable version of this chunk.
      Returns:
      a BlockChunk that is immutable
